brief:
🌅 GOOD MORNING, SOFÍA — MONDAY BRIEF

⏰ THIS WEEK
• Mon: Walk through 2693 Mission at 2pm — the second-chair space
• Wed: Mara's trial day (third stylist) — she has 2 other offers, decide by Sun
• Sat: Pay Salon Republic $740 (color stock)

💬 INBOUND I HANDLED
• Replied to 27 Instagram DMs — 9 bookings, 6 bridal inquiries, 3 quinces all moved forward
• Replied to Isabella Cruz (Sept 5 wedding at Cavallo Point) — she wants a July trial, hold July 11 at 11am
• Drafted replies to 4 reviews (1 was 2-star) for your approval

💰 MONEY
• 3 overdue receivables totaling $1,560 — Adriana and Lucia (bridal trials), Mariposa Events. Rosa confirmed Zelle Friday for Mariposa.
• 3 bridal leads from Thumbtack — I auto-replied within 2 minutes; 2 are warm

🔥 ATTENTION
• Stephanie K. left a 3-star — front-desk booking complaint. I drafted a reply offering a free color next visit. Approve?
• Cosmetology license expires July 30 — you need 32 CE hours; I found 3 online courses that fit your schedule

👋 PEOPLE
• Mara is waiting on you. She has offers expiring Friday. My read: hire her — her texture work is the best of the three

✅ I HANDLED FOR YOU THIS WEEK
• Replied to 27 DMs and 8 reviews (drafts queued for approval)
• Posted 3 Instagram pieces (curly Tuesday, bridal availability, Saturday quince)
• Booked 11 of the inbound DMs as confirmed appointments

One question: do you want me to send Mara the offer tonight, or wait to see her trial Wednesday first?

qa.what should i do first today|what should: Three things, Sofía. First: Mara needs an answer by Friday — she has two other offers. My read is yes. Second: I cleared most of your DMs but 3 bridal inquiries need your voice, not mine — I'll show you which. Third: Stephanie's 3-star review — I drafted a reply, you just need to hit send.
qa.dm|instagram|messages|inbox: You had 27 unread DMs this morning. I handled 24 — 11 became confirmed appointments, 6 are warm bridal inquiries waiting on you, 7 needed simple info answers. The 3 I held back are wedding inquiries — they're the kind of message that needs to sound like you.
qa.who owes me money|outstanding|invoices|l: Three open: Adriana $180 and Lucia $180 from bridal trials, Mariposa Events $1,200 for the Galleria quince. Rosa from Mariposa confirmed Zelle Friday. I sent friendly nudges to Adriana and Lucia — Adriana already replied she'll pay tonight.
qa.hire|mara|stylist|third chair: Hire Mara. Her texture work is the strongest of the three candidates, and she's the only one with bridal updo experience. Her offers expire Friday. I drafted the offer letter — want me to send it tonight at $32/hr + 45% commission?
qa.review|negative|3 star|stephanie: Stephanie K. left 3 stars — color was perfect but booking through DMs failed her three times. Here's my draft: 'Stephanie, you're right — getting a chair shouldn't take three DMs. We're putting in a real booking system this month, and your color is on us next time. — Sofía.' Send it?
qa.bridal|wedding|isabella: Isabella Cruz emailed for a Sept 5 wedding at Cavallo Point — herself and 4 bridesmaids, all curly. She's the strongest lead this week. I held July 11 at 11am for her trial. Reply yes?
qa.lease|second chair|2693|expansion: Patricia's offering 2693 Mission at $1,400/mo, 280 sq ft. If you hire Mara, the cash flow supports it within 60 days. Walk through Wednesday at 2pm — I added it to your calendar.
qa.license|cosmetology|renewal: License expires July 30. You need 32 CE hours and $50. I found three online courses that fit your Sunday closures — about $180 total. Want me to enroll you?
qa.default: Sofía, I have your DMs, your inbox, your calendar, and every review. Try 'what's first today' or 'who owes me money' or 'should I hire Mara' — I'll answer in 10 seconds.
